---
title: "Elected MPs"
imgSrc: "../../assets/images/houses-of-parliament.jpg"
imgAlt: "Facade of Greek Parliament"
description: "MPs elected on Greek Parliament (1974 - 2023)"
periodText: "PERIOD"
period: "1981-2020"
recordsText: "RECORDS"
records: "5 704"
languageText: "LANGUAGE"
languageAns: "Greek / English"
exploreDatasetText: "Explore dataset"
toc: true
toc-location: left
comments: false
lang: en
---

::: {.text-center .lh-lg}
<i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i> `Programming Language`: R <br>
<i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i> `Software`: rvest <br>
<i class="bi bi-database"></i> `Data Source`: [Hellenic Parliament](https://www.hellenicparliament.gr/en/) <br>
<i class="bi bi-list-ol"></i> `# of observations - rows`: 4503 <br>
<i class="bi bi-list-ol"></i> `# of variables - columns`: 4 <br>
<i class="bi bi-translate"></i> `Languages`:  🇬🇧  / 🇬🇷 <br>
<i class="bi bi-activity"></i> `Frequency `: Μη επαναλαμβανόμενο
:::


:::{.d-flex .flex-column .flex-sm-row .justify-content-center .gap-3 .align-items-center .justify-content-center .p-2}
```{=html}
<div><a href="https://github.com/stesiam/scrape-greek-parl-members-26/releases/tag/v1.1.0" class="btn btn-primary btn-md"><i class="bi bi-database"></i> Data</a></div>
<div><a href="https://github.com/stesiam/scrape-greek-parl-members-26" class="btn btn-primary btn-md"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> Repository</a></div>
```
:::

## Εισαγωγή
